templates.summary: Create an associative rectangular array (ARRAYRECT) from the drawing's last-created entity, via explicit Count/Spacing/eXit command sub-options.

row_spacing.description: Distance between rows (drawing units; ARRAYRECT's Spacing sub-option).

col_spacing.description: Distance between columns (drawing units; ARRAYRECT's Spacing sub-option).

postconditions.description: Associative ARRAYRECT wraps its source entity as a single selectable object, so modelspace entity count must be unchanged.

templates.notes: v1 scope limitation: selects via AutoCAD's 'L' (Last) option, not an agent-addressable handle. This template exists for the DCM/associativity coverage census and reuses the governed ARRAYRECT command sequence with typed numeric slots only.
